# AppToAppLayerVPNMapping.AppLayerVPNMappingItem

**Device Management Profile**

A dictionary defining a per-app VPN relationship.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppToAppLayerVPNMapping.AppLayerVPNMappingItem
```

## Objects

- **AppToAppLayerVPNMapping.AppLayerVPNMappingItem.MatchToolsItem**: Specifies a per-app VPN rule to match network traffic that the app’s spawned command-line tool generates.

items.description: Specifies a per-app VPN rule to match network traffic that the app’s spawned command-line tool generates.
